notes: Swift 단독. 기존 baton CLI(team-run 명령+watch) 소비만 — packages/* 무변경(TS 회귀 0). 로직 BatonKit 테스트, View 수동 QA. 시작 기본 stub(토글 off).

tasks.title: TeamRun 계약(Codable) + 봉투
tasks.description: apps/macos/Baton/Sources/BatonKit/Contract/TeamRun.swift: TeamRunRoleUsage{inputTokens,outputTokens:Int, estimated:Bool}, TeamRunRole{roleId,name,assignedAgentId,status:String; startedAt,completedAt,reason,summary:String?; usage:TeamRunRoleUsage?; artifacts:[String]?; id=roleId}, TeamRun{id,projectId,status,createdAt:String; updatedAt:String?; order:[String]; roles:[TeamRunRole]; worktreePath,baseBranch,diffSummary:String?}, TeamRunSummary{teamRunId,projectId,status,createdAt; id=teamRunId}, TeamRunList{teamRuns:[TeamRunSummary]}. 전부 Codable/Equatable/Sendable, optional 관대 디코드. 봉투 kind team-run/team-run-list. 테스트: 실제 CLI JSON 픽스처 디코딩(awaiting-review 상태, usage, diffSummary, optional 누락).

tasks.title: BatonClient team-run 메서드
tasks.description: Sources/BatonKit/Client/BatonClient.swift: listTeamRuns(projectId)->TeamRunList(team-run-list), showTeamRun(id)->TeamRun(team-run), startTeamRun(projectId, options:StartTeamRunOptions{codex,claude,write:Bool; baseBranch:String?; timeoutMs:Int?})->TeamRun(start --json), approveTeamRun(id,reject:Bool,note:String?)->CommandResult, reviewTeamRun(id,accept:Bool,note:String?)->CommandResult. 인자: project plan run start/approve/reject/review/show/list (+--codex/--claude/--write/--base/--timeout-ms/--json/--accept/--reject/--note). decodeJSON/runMutation 재사용. 테스트(mock CommandRunner): 각 메서드의 인자 배열 + 봉투 디코드.

tasks.title: 순수: teamRunStatusByRole + 라벨 + MonitorModel
tasks.description: Sources/BatonKit/Org/TeamRunStatus.swift: teamRunStatusByRole(TeamRun)->[String:String](roleId→status), teamRunStatusLabel(String)->String 한국어(planned 계획됨/running 진행 중/awaiting-approval 승인 대기/awaiting-review 검토 대기/completed 완료/failed 실패/cancelled 취소됨/skipped 건너뜀). Sources/BatonKit/Store/TeamRunMonitorModel.swift: summaries/selectedId/current + latest(createdAt)/selected/canApprove(status==awaiting-approval)/canReview(status==awaiting-review)/statusByRole(current→teamRunStatusByRole else [:]) + select/setCurrent/setSummaries. 순수/Equatable/Sendable. 테스트: 매핑/라벨/가용성/latest/statusByRole.

tasks.title: 실행 탭 모니터 + 조직도 점등 + watch
tasks.description: Sources/BatonApp/ExecutionView.swift: 실행 탭 모니터 — team-run 선택(기본 최신) + 시작(provider 토글 codex/claude + write 토글, 기본 off=stub; base/timeout) → startTeamRun. 역할별 행(상태 점+teamRunStatusLabel, 담당 AI, summary, usage). canApprove면 승인/거부(approveTeamRun), canReview면 diff 검토(diffSummary 표시 + accept/reject=reviewTeamRun, diff.patch 경로 안내). 토큰 사용량 표. watch 구독 → teamRun.* 이벤트 시 showTeamRun 재조회(@MainActor). 새로고침 버튼. ProjectDetailView.swift: .run→ExecutionView, .org→OrgChartView(buildOrgChart(project:, statusByRole: monitor.statusByRole)). OrgChartView.swift: statusLabel에 awaiting-review='검토 대기' 추가. View 얇게(BatonKit 의존). swift build 컴파일.

tasks.title: README/UX + 게이트(TS 회귀 0)
tasks.description: apps/macos/README.md/UX.md: 실행 모니터(상태/승인/diff 검토/토큰), 조직도 라이브 점등, watch 갱신 + 수동 QA 체크리스트(시작→승인→실행→점등→diff 검토). 게이트: apps/macos/Baton swift build/test + git diff --stat -- packages 비어 있음(TS 회귀 0). 자체 diff 리뷰. 최종 요약(UI 수동 QA·TS 무변경 명시).
